name: Grilled Tempeh with Red Onion & Eggplant
recipeIngredient: 2 large Garlic cloves, sliced into ovals
recipeInstructions:
Grilled Tempeh
3 Tempeh cakes
1 large Red onion, sliced into 6 rounds
2 small Eggplants, sliced into 1/3-inch thick rounds
Olive oil
12 whole wheat bread slices
1 bunch Arugula
Prepare the marinade by combining all ingredients and mixing.
Slice the tempeh cakes in half crosswise, then split each half horizontally by slicing carefully. Marinate for an hour at room temperature.
Brush eggplant slices with olive oil. Grill eggplant and onion slices over medium-hot coals for 10 minutes per side. Grill bread slices over low coals until toasty. Arrange vegetables and tempeh on toasted bread, garnished with arugula.
